proposer_reasoning: I identified a race condition in checkout.py that can lead to duplicate charges, as two threads may read the same cart total simultaneously before processing payments. I propose implementing a row-level lock on the cart data to ensure that only one thread can read and modify the cart total at a time, thereby preventing double billing. This fix is critical to maintaining the integrity of payment processing and preventing customer complaints in the morning.
